title: Kolo Mee with Fermented Shrimp Paste
description: A snappy Malaysian dish featuring fermented shrimp paste, served with a twist of sesame seeds and a touch of binchotan charcoal. This recipe is a perfect monsoon-season meal, easy to prepare and featuring a dash-friendly flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Fermented shrimp paste
ingredients.notes: Available at most Asian grocery stores or online.

ingredients.name: Binchotan charcoal
ingredients.notes: Available at most Asian grocery stores or online.

instructions: Cook the kolo mee noodles according to package instructions.
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the fermented shrimp paste and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the garlic, ginger, and chili peppers and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, and sugar and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the cooked noodles and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve with a piece of binchotan charcoal on the side.
